upasargachandrika.example_text: 'divaScitte praririce mahitvam' (f॰1.59.5)
'asyedeva praririce mahitvaM divaspfTivyAH paryantarikzAt' (aTarva॰20.35.9) atra pretyupasargo DAtvarTaM bADate prasmaraRaM prasTAnam ityatra yaTA
'pra te mahnA ririce rodasyoH' (f0 6243) praririce atiririce
'Asanna iva vA'yaM lokaH prarikta ivAsAvanyaH' (tE0 brA0 234) prarikto dUrasTo viprakfzwaH
'ataScidasya mahimA vi reci' (f0 4165) vireci vyatirikto'BUt jyAyAnaBUdityarTaH
'yaH somaM pItvA Cardayeta viricyeta vA' (lAwyA0 SrO0 8109) viricyeta saMjAtavirekaH syAt
'vAnto viriktaH' (manu0 5144) ukto'rTaH
'sasasyAnAM ca sImAnAM na lakzmIrvyatiricyate' (hari0 21028) na vyatiricyate (anyo'nyasya) nAtiSete
'stutiByo byatiricyante dUreRa caritAni te' (raGu0 1031) sudUramatikrAmanti niHSezeRa stotuM na Sakyanta ityarTaH na matto vyatiricyate na mad Bidyata ityarTaH
'kftsnaM vikArajAtaM sattvarajastamAMsi na vyatiricyante' (suSruta0 1906) vikArajAtAtpfTagBUtvA na vartante kintarhi sahEva vartanta ityAha
'atra dvitIyArDavyatirekeRa dvitIyapAdasyEvArTa iti punaruktatA' (sA0 da0 711-12 ityatrodAharaRam) vyatireko vEparItyam
'sa sunvata indraH sUryamA devo riRaN martyAya stavAn' (f0 2195) AriRak Arecayat
'ArecitamrUlatA0' (ku0 35) Arecite vakrIBUte
'saMBAvitasya cAkIrtirmaraRAdatiricyate' (gItA0 234) maraRAdaDikA Bavati akIrtirayaSa upakroSaH akIrtiranizwatarA duHKatarA BavatItyASayaH
'putragAtrasya saMsparSaScandanAdatiricyate' (BA0 vana0 ) candanAcCreyAnBavati suKAvahataro BavatItyarTaH
'na tadBUtamahaM manye yadarkAdatiricyate' (BA0 vana0 345) tataH Sreyo BavatItyarTaH
'aSvameDasahasreByaH satyamevAtiricyate' (hitopa0 4131) tato jyAyo BavatItyarTaH
'gfhaM tu gfhiRIhInaM kAntArAdatiricyate' (paYcata0 481) aDikamanezaRIyaM Bavati SUnyatvAdatitarAM pratiBayaM BavatIti BAvaH vAcaH karmAtiricyate karma garIyo Bavati
'dEvamatrAtiricyate' (hitopa0) dEvamuttaraM Bavati praBavatIti yAvat
'AkiYcanyaM ca rAjyaM ca tulayA samatolayam atyaricyata dAridryaM rAjyAdapi guRADikam' (rA0 goresiyo0 26110) atiriktaM hi dAridryasya gOravaM prAdurAsIt ityarTaH
'CandasAmati trIRyaricyanta na trIRyudaBavan' (tE0 brA0 15121) trIRi BUyokzarARyaBUvan trIRi ca nyUnAkzarARItyAha
'na vA AtmANgAnyatiricyate nAtmAnamaNgAnyatiricyante' (Sa0 brA0 12236) pfTagavasTitAni nopalaByante AtmanAntarIyakARi BavantIti BAvaH Atmeha dehavacanaH
'yasya divamati mahvA pfTivyAH purumAyasya ririce mahitvam' (f0 6212) divamatiririce mahattvam divopi jyAyo baBUva divamatilaNGya papraTa ityAha
'somaM mAtirIricaH' (Sa0 brA0 4427) mA'tisAvIrityarTaH
'idaM vA'tyarIricannidaM nyUnamakran' (Sa0 brA0 11237) atyarIrican yAvad vihitaM tato tiriktamavArizuH
'yadasya karmaRotyarIricaM yadvA nyUnamihAkaram' (Apa0 SrO0 3151) ukto'rTaH
'DriyamARaH kapotastu mAMsenAtyatiricyate' (BA0 vana0 13127) atyatiricyate=atitarAmatirikto Bavati guruBArataro BavatItyAha
'uta te SatAnmaGavannucca BUyasa ut sahasrAd ririce kfzwizu SravaH' (f0 11027) udririce=udriktam atiriktaM baBUva
'mamEvodricyate janma…tava janmanaH' (BA0) udricyate tato'tiSAyi Bavati
'udinnvasya ricyateMSaH' (aTarva0 20593) aByaDiko BavatItyarTaH
'uttarottarameteByo varzamudricyate guREH' (BA0 BIzma0 639) udricyate utkfzwataraM Bavati
'SiKarEH KamivodriktEH' (rA0 gore0 21034) KamudriktErgaganAtigEH
'udriktacetA mahAmanA manasvI' (kaTA0 3273)
'anudriktAvanUnO' (mArka0 pu0 465) anudriktO=anaByaDikO
'vAjinodrekeRa diSaH pratiyajati' (BA0 SrO0 843) udrekaH SezaH
'udrekeRa paSubanDavad diSaH pratIjya' (Apa0 SrO0 81312) uktapUrva evArTaH sTAlIsTamagnisaMyogAd udreki salilaM yaTA (vi0 pu0 2489) udreki utseki utsecanavat
'tezAmudriktacittAnAmaBizekAmbuBiH samam viveko vigalatyoGenohyamAna ivAKilaH' (kaTA0 9255)..
'hotAraM vA aByatiricyate yadaBiricyate' (tE0 saM0 7156) hotAramaByatiricyate'tiriktamurvaritamatiSizwaM hotrarTaM Bavati hoturBAgo BavatItyarTaH
